channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran live updates: 'We are just getting started,' Hegseth says
item.description: IDF airstrikes targeted "dozens" of sites connected to internal security forces.

item.title: Jasmine Crockett concedes to James Talarico in Texas Democratic Senate primary
Noem defends immigration crackdown and criticizes DHS funding lapse at hearing
item.description: Democratic senators and some Republicans grilled DHS Secretary Kristi Noem at a hearing on Tuesday where she defended her handling of the Trump admini...

item.title: WATCH: Childhood photo meme trend sweeps the internet
item.description: Robin Roberts, George Stephanopoulos, Michael Strahan and others from the âGMAâ team put their own spin on the nostalgic trend taking over social medi...

item.title: WATCH: Firefighters rescue woman from sinking car
item.description: Body camera video captured the rescue of a 19-year-old trapped in her overturned vehicle after losing control of it on a winter road and crashing into...

item.title: What we know about the U.S. soldiers killed in Kuwait as the Iran war began
item.description: The U.S. has released the names of four U.S. Army Reserve soldiers who were killed in Kuwait after an Iranian strike hit a tactical operations center....

item.title: WATCH: NBA legend defies gravity, still slam dunks at 70
item.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to NBA legend Marques Johnson, who says this year may be his final birthday dunk.

item.title: Trump sends mixed messages on Iran war
item.description: President Trump contradicted Secretary of State Marco Rubio on the reasons why the U.S. chose to strike Iran. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.

item.title: Caine says U.S. is making "steady progress" in Iran war operations
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Joint Chiefs Chairman Gen. Dan Caine held their second briefing on Iran war operations as the conflict entered its ...

item.title: What is the price of gold today?
item.description: Understanding the pricing trends and dynamics of the gold market is crucial for making sound financial choices.

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: Military families anxious about unknowns of Iran war, proud of their service members
US soldiers who died in Iran war remembered as devoted parents and reservists
item.description: Four of the six U.S. soldiers killed in the Iran war have been identified by the Pentagon as members of the Army Reserve.
